meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve can't monetize skills (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome can't monetize skills. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve can't monetize skills
content.seo_description: Stop trading hours for dollars. Learn how to price your SaaS products effectively and overcome monetization hurdles using Antigravity and Claude Code today.
content.answer_block: Monetization failure stems from pricing time instead of value. To scale, transition to tiered SaaS pricing models based on feature-gated utility. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code for automated iteration, you can deploy value-driven SaaS products that command premium recurring revenue while minimizing your development overhead.
content.intro:
You are staring at a codebase that works perfectly, yet your bank account remains stagnant. The silent killer of the freelance developer isn't bad code; it's the commodity trap—selling your labor by the hour while your clients reap the exponential rewards of your technical architecture. You have built the engine, but you are still charging for the parts.

The shift from freelancer to SaaS founder requires a psychological and mechanical pivot. It demands moving away from hourly billing toward a value-based pricing model that scales automatically. With the right tooling, you can compress months of development into weeks, allowing you to launch, test, and iterate on pricing tiers before your competitors have even finished their first sprint.

steps.title: Define Value-Based Tiers
steps.description: Identify the core problem your tool solves and segment the solution into three distinct tiers: Starter (Basic utility), Pro (Automation focus), and Enterprise (Scale/Security).
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the core feature set of this project and propose three distinct pricing tiers based on usage limits, feature access, and support level to maximize MRR.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Generate a pricing tier schema for my database based on the feature list'

steps.title: Implement Feature Gating
steps.description: Use middleware to restrict access to specific routes or API endpoints based on the user's subscription tier.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust middleware structure for feature-gating routes based on a subscription object in the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Implement feature gating logic in the auth middleware'

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Billing
steps.description: Set up Stripe Checkout sessions that dynamically handle the tiers defined in Step 1.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for Stripe integration that handles subscription creation and webhooks for tier upgrades.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'npm install stripe && setup stripe webhook handler'

steps.title: Automate Usage Tracking
steps.description: Implement telemetry to track usage metrics, allowing you to trigger 'overage' alerts or automatic tier bumps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a usage tracking service that logs API calls per user and checks them against tier limits.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Add usage tracking decorator to all controller methods'

steps.title: Optimize Conversion Funnel
steps.description: Add in-app prompts that encourage users to upgrade when they hit a usage limit or attempt to access a Pro feature.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a react component that triggers a modal when a user attempts to access a restricted tier feature.

pro_tips: Always price your entry tier at a 'no-brainer' price point to capture market data, then aggressively upsell the Pro tier.
Use 'Shadow Pricing' where you test different price points for new signups to see which tier converts better without altering existing user plans.
Never hardcode your pricing tiers; store them in a JSON config or database table so you can update them without a full redeploy.
Implement a 'Graceful Degradation' UI where users see the value of a locked feature rather than just a 403 error page.
Offer an annual billing discount to improve cash flow early, which is essential for bootstrapping your first SaaS projects.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing tiers are live, conduct A/B testing on your landing page copy to see which feature benefits drive the highest conversion rates.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for free and start building for scale. By automating your monetization strategy, you move from a service provider to a product owner. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
